revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{#switch:{{#if:{{{title|}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{last1|{{{last|{{{author1|{{{author|{{{vauthors|{{{surname|{{{surname1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|1|{{#if:{{{authors|}}}|2|0}}}}
|00
|01
|10=A bot will complete this citation soon. <small>[https://citations.toolforge.org/process_page.php?page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}&edit=arXiv Click here to jump the queue]</small>{{#switch:{{lc:{{NAMESPACE}}}}||draft|template|wikipedia=[[Category:Articles with missing Cite arXiv inputs|{{PAGENAME}}]]|#default=}} [[arXiv]]:[https://arxiv.org/abs/{{{arxiv|{{{eprint|}}}}}} {{{arxiv|{{{eprint|}}}}}}].
|02 <!-- with or without |title= and with |authors= -->
|12
|11={{#invoke:citation/CS1|citation|CitationClass=arxiv}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{#switch:{{#if:{{{title|}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{last1|{{{last|{{{author1|{{{author|{{{vauthors|{{{surname|{{{surname1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|1|{{#if:{{{authors|}}}|2|0}}}}
|00
|01
|10=A bot will complete this citation soon. <small>[https://citations.toolforge.org/process_page.php?page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}&edit=arXiv Click here to jump the queue]</small>{{#switch:{{lc:{{NAMESPACE}}}}||draft|template|wikipedia=[[Category:Articles with missing Cite arXiv inputs|{{PAGENAME}}]]|#default=}} [[arXiv]]:[https://arxiv.org/abs/{{{arxiv|{{{eprint|}}}}}} {{{arxiv|{{{eprint|}}}}}}].
|02 <!-- with or without |title= and with |authors= -->
|12
|11={{#invoke:citation/CS1|citation|CitationClass=arxiv}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_arXiv here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_arXiv for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude><includeonly>{{#switch:{{#if:{{{title|}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{last1|{{{last|{{{author1|{{{author|{{{vauthors|{{{surname|{{{surname1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|1|{{#if:{{{authors|}}}|2|0}}}} |00 |01 |10=A bot will complete this citation soon. <small>[https://citations.toolforge.org/process_page.php?page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}&edit=arXiv Click here to jump the queue]</small>{{#switch:{{lc:{{NAMESPACE}}}}||draft|template|wikipedia=|#default=}} [[arXiv]]:[https://arxiv.org/abs/{{{arxiv|{{{eprint|}}}}}} {{{arxiv|{{{eprint|}}}}}}]. |02 <!-- with or without |title= and with |authors= --> |12 |11={{#invoke:citation/CS1|citation|CitationClass=arxiv}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Articles with missing Cite arXiv inputs|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
